name: @thewhiteprotocol/evm
description: The White Protocol - EVM chain implementations (Base, Ethereum, Polygon, Polygon zkEVM, BSC)

scripts.test:e2e:base:repeat: NETWORK=base-sepolia tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts && NETWORK=base-sepolia tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts
scripts.test:e2e:bsc:testnet:repeat: NETWORK=bsc-testnet tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts && NETWORK=bsc-testnet tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts
scripts.test:e2e:bnb:testnet:repeat: NETWORK=bsc-testnet tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts && NETWORK=bsc-testnet tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ethereum:sepolia:repeat: NETWORK=ethereum-sepolia tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts && NETWORK=ethereum-sepolia tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts
scripts.test:e2e:eth:sepolia:repeat: NETWORK=ethereum-sepolia tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts && NETWORK=ethereum-sepolia tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts
scripts.test:e2e:polygon:amoy:repeat: NETWORK=polygon-amoy tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts && NETWORK=polygon-amoy tsx test/e2e-base-full.ts
scripts.verify:base-sepolia: echo 'Run with BASESCAN_API_KEY env var set'; forge verify-contract --chain-id 84532 --compiler-version v0.8.20+commit.a1b79de6 0x396e539bCDeAF48ab9526A13c6E688CBA69C059a WhiteProtocol --watch
